top_signals.title: China exports jump at fastest pace since 2021 as AI boom, tariff rush lift trade
top_signals.summary: China's trade growth accelerated far more than expected in June, as booming global demand for AI hardware and a rush by exporters to beat anticipated tariff hikes turbocharged shipments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
